source_reference: HTTP Retry-After header behavior documented in HTTP specifications and MDN references
title: Parse Retry-After delay seconds
prompt: Fix parse_retry_after so positive integer delay values return seconds and invalid or negative values return None. Preserve the current function signature.
hidden_tests_description: Whitespace, zero, fractional values, date-like values, and non-numeric strings are checked.
anti_xendris_bias_notes: The candidate rewards protocol-inspired defensive parsing only.
h0_risk_notes: A baseline with basic validation discipline should remain competitive.
